task_description: 将两个非阻塞点正式写入 WrenAI V1 ralplan：V1 UI 统一 kb_snapshot selector；secret 采用应用层加密 + 环境主密钥且 V1 不做自动轮换。
request: 分析 docs/需求V1.md 和 docs/refer_dula，并结合当前代码形成可执行的改造计划
decisions: 内建账号体系，保留 SSO/OIDC 扩展
产品层只保留知识库，project 退到内部 runtime identity
V1 API source 默认 REST JSON connector
权限首期只做 workspace + knowledge_base
尽快用 deepagents 替换 ask 编排
resolved_user_decisions: V1 UI uses one unified kb_snapshot selector
secret uses app-layer encryption + environment master key
V1 secret management reserves key_version and re-encryption script but no auto rotation
